## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Updated the README/docs if user-facing behavior changed
